trades.reasoning: Score 95 with volume surge, MACD bullish crossover, and RSI 63.2 sitting in the ideal momentum zone — best risk/reward setup on the screener today.
Score 90 with RSI 57.5 leaving meaningful room to run before overbought territory, MACD bullish crossover, and semiconductor sector showing broad underlying strength.

decisions.briefing: A quiet, slightly positive session with S&P 500 up 0.4% and NASDAQ +0.2% — no major catalysts, just mild drift higher. With 4 open slots and $943 in cash, the rules strongly favor deployment; UTI (vocational training, score 95, volume surge) and INTC (semiconductors, score 90, low RSI) offer the best combination of momentum confirmation and room to run. Existing portfolio at +25.6% shows no stop-loss or profit-target triggers, so all current positions hold.

market_education.summary_en: Markets edged higher Monday in low-conviction trading, with the S&P 500 gaining 0.4% and NASDAQ adding 0.2% as investors awaited fresh macro catalysts ahead of upcoming economic data releases. Semiconductor and AI-adjacent names quietly outperformed the broader tape, driven by persistent demand expectations and continued sector rotation out of defensive names. With no dominant headline driver, momentum and technical setups became the primary factor separating winning stocks from the flat tape.
market_education.summary_zh: 週一市場在缺乏重大催化劑的情況下小幅走高，標普500指數上漲0.4%，納斯達克指數上漲0.2%，整體交投氣氛審慎。半導體及AI相關板塊悄然跑贏大市，主要受惠於市場對持續強勁需求的預期，以及資金從防禦性板塊的輪動。由於缺乏主導性消息，技術面動能成為區分強弱個股的關鍵因素。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already trending upward — with rising prices, bullish technical signals, and above-average volume — on the thesis that strong trends tend to persist. Today's top picks like UTI and PTON display classic momentum signals: RSI in the 60–70 sweet spot (bullish but not yet overbought), MACD crossovers, and volume surges confirming buyer conviction. The core risk is that momentum can reverse sharply once buyers exhaust themselves, which is why stop-losses are essential.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資的核心邏輯是「追漲」——買入已呈上升趨勢的股票，包括價格持續走高、技術指標偏多及成交量放大，押注強勢趨勢會延續。今日入選的UTI、PTON等個股均呈現典型動能訊號：RSI介於60至70的「黃金區間」（偏強但未超買）、MACD黃金交叉，以及成交量放大確認買方意志。此策略最大的風險在於一旦買盤耗盡，趨勢可能急速逆轉，因此嚴守止損至關重要。
